message: I love her interesting personality and the heartfelt feeling of the stream. Looking forward to more amazing and memorable moments in the future!

author: Haru
message: Yo-ho, Mack! I hope we can give you the support you deserve as your Kanikis! Happy to be here with you!

author: St3ll4
message: Hello there! you're quite shorter than i expected, hope you have a fun time!

author: luminull
message: Hi Saba! I'm really excited to see everything you do in the future! Here's some art I made real quick!

author: Thalor
message: Yoho! Congratulations on your debut, Saba! It’s truly exciting to see you set sail on a brand new adventure. I'm just so happy! I'll always be there every wave of the way!

author: JohnCoolWhip
message: Saba, congratulations on your debut! I’m super excited to see what you do next and can’t wait to make some amazing memories with you! I’m so glad I’m your Kaniki! 🐟💙🦀
